# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure resources that use service endpoints for connectivity. Enable service endpoints for Storage and SQL on our VNet but allow public access as fallback. This provides flexibility for accessing resources from both Azure and on-premises during migration.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  resources:
    - name: vnet
      type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
      apiVersion: 2019-10-01
      properties:
        location: eastus
        resourceGroupName: myResourceGroup
        addressSpace:
          addresses:
            - '10.0.0.0/16'
        subnets:
          - name: aks
            addressPrefix: 10.0.2.0/24
          - name: endpoint
            addressPrefix: 10.0.1.0/24
      dependencies: []

    - name: vnetSubnetInterfaceLink
      type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets/virtualNetworkSubnetInterfaces
      apiVersion: 2019-04-01
      properties:
        subnet:
          id: /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroup}/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/{vnetName}/subnets/endpoint
        virtualNetwork:
          id: /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroup}/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/{vnetName}
        name: interface
        securityGroup:
          id: /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroup}/providers/Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/{nsgName}

    - name: sql-se
      type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/elasticPools/vulnerabilityAssessments/serviceEndpoints
      apiVersion: 2019-04-01-preview
      properties:
        location: eastus
        parameters:
          serverName: '{serverName}'
          elasticPoolName: '{elasticPoolName}'
          resourceGroupName: myResourceGroup
          serviceEndpointName: sql-se
          subnetId: /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroup}/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/{vnetName}/subnets/endpoint

    - name: storage-se
      type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/networkRules/serviceEndpoints
      apiVersion: 2019-04-01
      properties:
        location: eastus
        parameters:
          accountName: '{accountName}'
          serviceEndpointName: storage-se
          resourceGroupName: myResourceGroup
          subnetId: /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroup}/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/{vnetName}/subnets/endpoint
